description: Enhanced sorting on both the boards list and inside each kanban board. The boards list now supports Newest First, A→Z, Last Updated, and a Custom drag-to-reorder mode — all persisted between sessions. Inside a board, you can now sort any column by priority (Urgent → Low) and use the new Sort toolbar control to apply a sort across all columns at once. Column headers show a small badge indicating the active sort.
Added an /update-log page so you can see what's changed in Lumio over time.
Fixed an issue where tapping the date picker inside the card sidebar would accidentally close the sidebar.
You can now embed a form on any external website and copy a ready-to-use code snippet directly from the Forms page.
Public forms can now be fetched and submitted from any domain — CORS support added for embedded form use cases.
Overdue card notifications now check reliably every 15 minutes so you never miss a deadline alert.
